summary_one_line: IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must equal 3 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE) to take the true branch.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR color_type byte at file offset 0x19 must hold the value 0x03 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE) so that the equality test info_ptr->color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE is true.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed carries 0x03 at offset 0x19 (W bytes 03(.)x30, all 30 occurrences), exactly matching the PALETTE constant compared at line 276.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds never hold 0x03 at offset 0x19 (L bytes 00(.)x7 04(.)x2 06(.)x1) so the color_type equality test is always false.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog intercepts the integer CMP at line 276 via __sanitizer_cov_trace_cmp1, logging the constant operand 3; I2SRandReplace then substitutes 3 into the color_type byte, deterministically solving the equality where naive must blind-mutate the exact value.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must equal 0x03; value_profile rewards inputs whose color_type byte moves closer (smaller Hamming distance) to the compared constant 3.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds reach 0x03 at offset 0x19 (W bytes 03(.)x30); value_profile preserves intermediate inputs that narrowed the CMP-operand distance to the constant, climbing the gradient to an exact match.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds stall at non-3 color_type values (L bytes 00(.)x7 04(.)x2 06(.)x1); naive lacks the CMP_MAP distance feedback so partial progress toward 3 is not preserved as corpus.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile writes each CMP into a CMP_MAP keyed by (PC, operand-distance bucket); an input whose color_type byte is closer to the constant 3 opens a new bucket and is retained, building a Hamming-distance gradient toward equality that naive cannot follow.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must equal 0x03 to take the true branch at line 276 inside OSS_FUZZ_png_set_IHDR.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds carry 0x03 at offset 0x19 (W bytes 03(.)x30); naive_ctx indexes the same edges by call context, so reaching png_set_IHDR via additional call paths registers new (context,edge) coverage and rewards intermediate inputs that retain more PNG chunk structure.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds never set color_type to 3 (L bytes 00(.)x7 04(.)x2 06(.)x1); naive's flat edge map gives no extra credit for distinct call contexts, so it preserves fewer structurally-valid intermediates that could be mutated into the PALETTE value.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: naive_ctx's CtxHook folds the caller chain into the edge-map index so the same edge counts as new coverage under different call contexts; this finer feedback retains more chunk-valid corpus members from which havoc reaches color_type==3, whereas naive's bare-edge map does not.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is an equality test of color_type against PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE, true side globally blocked.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
if (info_ptr->color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE)
Globally blocked side: T  (true branch)

evidence_trail.claim: All winner-resolving seeds hold 0x03 at offset 0x19 while no loser holds 3 there.
The winner takes the true side 30 times while the loser never does at line 276.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 276  T=30 F=0  T=0 F=10  if (info_ptr->color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE)

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes a logged CMP operand at matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog wins the I2S pair: resolved 10/10 vs loser 1/10.
value_profile writes CMP operands into a CMP_MAP keyed by operand-distance bucket, preserving inputs closer to matching.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile wins its decisive pair via the value_profile technique delta.
naive_ctx folds call context into the edge-map index, making (call-context, edge) pairs count as new coverage.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
the same basic-block edge is
recorded at different map slots depending on the call path that
reached it.

evidence_trail.claim: naive_ctx wins its decisive pair via the ctx_coverage technique delta.
naive has only flat edge counters and no I2S or CMP_MAP introspection.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 4085 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed <ID>` on four cmplog winner seeds (14ddd5a497528d88, 0ad471f0b6ede573, 04430d1404dcf240, 1ec8e0c7e8cdf005). Each ancestor chain contains I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -): depth 3, depth 10, depths 10+11, and depth 13 respectively — lower-bound evidence of I2SRandReplace contribution under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with an equality gate color_type==3 on a single input byte where cmplog does NOT resolve the gate faster than naive (no prob_div / time advantage), which would refute the I2S-substitution mechanism.

weakest_evidence_point: The value_profile and naive_ctx hypotheses share the same single-byte equality feature as I2S, so their distinct mechanism attributions rest on technique knowledge rather than seed-byte evidence that uniquely separates the three winners.
